subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest toward God! In the path of the spiritual Friend and true Beloved, surrender thou thy soul and spirit and peace of conscience [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر الی الله در سبیل دوست معنوی و یار حقیقی جان و روان و آسایش وجدان را
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @fire and light; fire and water
